ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient the results belong to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the lab test was conducted */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring the thyroid levels */,
  "lab_technician" TEXT /* Name of the lab technician who conducted the test */,
  "lab_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations from the lab */,
  "TSH_measured" TEXT /* Whether TSH level was measured */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH level result */,
  "T3_measured" TEXT /* Whether T3 level was measured */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 level result */,
  "TT4_measured" TEXT /* Whether TT4 level was measured */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 level result */,
  "T4U_measured" TEXT /* Whether T4U level was measured */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U level result */,
  "FTI_measured" TEXT /* Whether FTI level was measured */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI level result */,
  "TBG_measured" TEXT /* Whether TBG level was measured */,
  "TBG" REAL /* TBG level result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lab result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each lab result entry
Reference to the patient the results belong to
Date when the lab test was conducted
Method used for measuring the thyroid levels
Name of the lab technician who conducted the test
Any additional notes or observations from the lab
Timestamp when the lab result was recorded
Timestamp when the lab result was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher)
Timestamp of the user's last login
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
